title: Momonosuke, Heir of Kozuki
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on momonosuke, heir of kozuki within the Momonosuke, Heir of Kozuki storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Just a heads up guys! You don't have to bow your heads to us ever again! Or kneel! Being in an alliance means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Being friends!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Not even close!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Also, I'm fine with the alliance and everything... but I've got one condition.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wait a second! Perhaps you should have mentioned this be- fore!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're actually missing a crew member right now.

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Ah. That whole deal with Sanji, huh.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What did you say!? By big mom!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This is the first I've heard of it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: 'Cause you were sleeping your fat ass off when it all happened.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm gonna go and bring him back.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Until then, I want everyone to wait and not start any trouble! Besides, Sanji's super strong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He's pretty much worth a thousand people!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Is that so... that's reassuring.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Will you be okay? You'll be going up against a yonkou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's not like I'm gonna fight her! I'll be fine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I'll go with Peko- Mamushi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: J- Just so we're clear, I'm worth two thousand, got it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes, yes. We know.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Peko... mamushi?

dialogue.speaker: Nekomamushi
dialogue.text: Guardians' Residential District

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Today...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Today is a Day of Miracles!

dialogue.speaker: Inuarashi
dialogue.text: You've got that right. A long time ago, Duke Inuarashi and master nekomamushi were said to have been the best of friends.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: But one day, they returned after a very long journey, barely clinging to their lives.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: And even in that state, they were at each other's throats!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: A quarrel great enough that they'd almost killed each other!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This was all back before I was even born, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I wonder what HAP- penned...

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Even Pedro and I were just kids.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Today's the banquet celebrating the reconciliation of the two rulers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Now we can sleep and wake up whenever we want!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Where'd the straw hats go!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Objective sighted,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Yes. Thank you for pointing out the obvious, dumbass.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Lord Jack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: blasted thing. Can't believe I had to come here again.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Sheeps- head.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Someone knows I'll

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: "Riaizou isn't there," you said.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I find it hard to believe that you found it acceptable to return with such an answer.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Minks are hardy little rodents. What if...

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: The ones that managed to escape the gas treated the others?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: There's no way we can tell him that someone actually drove us out.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If they're all still half-dead, we'll simply go there and finish the job!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: pity is a trouble- some thing. The dead do not seek revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: There's no doubt they're weakened. If we just rush 'em, we'll soon be abl-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: There's no need to rush anywhere.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: CH:819 / end

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: I'll just kill this huge elephant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: In the shadow of the new great alliance, an inhuman villain approaches!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ehhh?!

summary: Momonosuke, Heir of Kozuki: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
